assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response correctly states Regular channel clusters will be automatically upgraded to next available version (likely 1.31+) 2-4 weeks after EoS

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly states Extended channel clusters will also be automatically upgraded after EoS with just a longer buffer (4-8 weeks), missing that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support meaning 1.30 EoS is much later for them

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response states No Channel clusters have 'immediate support cessation' and 'remain on unsupported version indefinitely', but doesn't mention that both control plane and node pools are actually force-upgraded at EoS

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response does not mention maintenance exclusions or the ability to temporarily defer EoS force-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response clearly recommends proactive manual upgrade as Option 1 and emphasizes 'acting before the automatic upgrades kick in to maintain control'

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'advance notifications' but does not specifically reference Cloud Logging as the mechanism for EoS notifications

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the deprecation insights dashboard, though it does mention auditing workload compatibility and checking for API changes

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response does not use the term 'snowflaking' or specifically warn against manually freezing versions, though it does highlight risks for the No Channel cluster
